title: Stackable Stews
description: Mushroom Stew, Beetroot Soup, Suspicious Stew & Rabbit Stew now stack up to 16!
body:
**⚠️ This data pack requires the server-side mod [Item Components](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components) ⚠️**

# 🍲 Stackable Stews
- **Stews stack to 16**, allowing it to be a usable food source
- **Compatible with vanilla clients**, without any disparity
